chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD 2nd Appeal No.10 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 22.10.2025 On the last date of hearing, this Court had directed that, since the office objection regarding non-payment of court fee had not been complied with within the stipulated time, a further period of seven days was granted for compliance. It was further ordered that in case of continued non- compliance regarding the deposit of court fee, the instant appeal would be deemed dismissed for non-compliance. Today, none is present on behalf of the appellant. No intimation is received. The office objection No.2, pertaining to non-payment of court fee, remains unaddressed. In view of the order articulated hereinabove and the Judgment of the Supreme Court of Pakistan reported in Kh. Muhammad Fazil v. Mumtaz Munnawar Khan Niazi(deceased) through L.Rs and another 2024 SCMR 1059, this Second Appeal stands dismissed for non-compliance. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
